title: taraxacum squarrosiceps
intro: Taraxacum squarrosiceps, also known as the rough-leaved dandelion, is a perennial plant species belonging to the sunflower family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Taraxacum squarrosiceps include reducing blood pressure, alleviating digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. Taraxacum squarrosiceps can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being.
